content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed — essentially at max — with INFY Q4 results post-market today being a binary event risk for the IT sector and broader market sentiment. HCLTECH just cratered 10% on weak FY27 guidance yesterday, setting a bearish anchor. Defensive rotation into FMCG (NESTLE, HUL) and Pharma (GRANULES) is visible, power theme remains hot (TORNTPOWER, ADANIPOWER at 52w highs), but VIX at 18.45 and essentially no remaining deployable capital means the priority is position management and SL placement — not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13%), analyst TPs Rs 88-90. Setting SL at 72 (below recent swing low 71.24 of 17-Apr, ~7% below CMP but acceptable for high-conviction PSU bank breakout). Target 88 gives 1:1.8 RR from CMP 77.58. Thesis intact — ride sector momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+10.5% gap-up on strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Trailing SL to 945 (~6% below CMP, just below yesterday's intraday low area). Target 1080 toward analyst consensus Rs 1143. RR ~2:1. Aggressive SL trail to lock in gains after large single-day move."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, flat today. Price 16% off 52w high, post-Akshaya Tritiya demand cooling but geopolitical hedge remains valid. Hold — no need to trail or exit at -0.7%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1595.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high, +5.9% on 2.3x volume. Trail SL to 1595 (just below yesterday's low 1551 area, protects most of gain and sits below EMA9 trail). Target 1800 toward analyst TP range 2000. Power theme strong but sector stretched — tight SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high post-blowout Q4 (+27% PAT, double-digit volume growth). Stock -0.4% from entry but close to highs. SL 1365 (~3.2% below CMP, above prior breakout zone ~1340). Target 1500. Sell-on-news risk given +19% 1-month run and 70x PE — tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "new_target": 1120.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to 52w high ahead of Q4 result Apr 27 (4 days away — binary event). SL 1010 protects breakout level and limits downside to ~4.4%. Target 1120. Holding through result is acceptable given strong provisional Q4 business update (advances +25%, deposits +23%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Pharma sector strength +3%, tariff reprieve, USFDA Chantilly clearance with minor 483s. Q4 result Apr 29 (6 days). SL 645 (~5.8% below CMP, below recent consolidation). Target 745 aligned with MOFSL TP 750. RR ~2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation, up 6.4% today. Q4 result Apr 30. SL 2280 (~4% below CMP, above yesterday's close 2231). Target 2550 (below Jefferies TP 2850). Conservative 1:1.8 RR; defensive posture."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Clean base-on-base breakout, MSCI ESG upgrade, EDF nuclear MoU, Q4 May 15. SL 385 below recent breakout pivot. Target 430 at 52w high / upper analyst band. RR ~1.5:1. Part of power cluster with TORNTPOWER/ADANIPOWER — no addition, just trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "All-time high, +35% in April — extended rally with shooting star pattern on 20-Apr signaling caution. Q4 result Apr 29. Tight SL at 200 (~7% below CMP, above key breakout zone). Target 235. Locking in most of gain; will not add given cluster concentration with TORNTPOWER + NTPC already in book."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "reasoning": "Below recent swing low 71.24, gives room for normal volatility on strong uptrend."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Aggressive trail after +10.5% gap move to lock in gains; below yesterday's intraday low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive allocation; no action needed at -0.7%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1595.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail below recent pivot; power sector stretched, protect 3.2% gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-earnings 52w high, sell-on-news risk; tight SL above breakout zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL ahead of Apr 27 Q4 binary event; protects breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Below recent consolidation base, ahead of Apr 29 Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive; tight SL ahead of Apr 30 Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Below base breakout pivot; clean technical structure."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended rally, shooting star pattern — tight SL appropriate to protect capital on cluster-heavy position."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "WIPRO (buyback arbitrage floor at 250), INFY (post-result reaction tomorrow), DRREDDY, CIPLA, DATAPATTNS, ELECON — all watchlist-only, no capital available. INFY Q4 at 3:45 PM today is the key binary event; will reassess IT sector tomorrow. HCLTECH bounce play too risky given weak FY27 guidance anchor. DEEPAKNTR gap-up on low volume — avoid. PIRAMALFIN +13% move looks extended without clear catalyst.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — at max capacity. No new entries today; priority is establishing SL/target on all 10 CNC positions which had SL=0 at entry (critical risk hygiene). Cluster exposure: Power (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) = ~Rs 1.52L = ~15% of portfolio — within limits but should not add more power. Financials cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) = ~Rs 2.5L = 25% of portfolio — approaching cluster limit. FMCG (NESTLE + HUL) = ~Rs 1.67L = 17%. Today's -10 unrealized is noise. Once some positions hit targets or get stopped out, cash frees up for selective re-entries. Key risk tomorrow: INFY post-result gap; any IT-led Nifty weakness will drag financials and power. Maintaining defensive posture via GOLDBEES + FMCG is intentional."
}
